$comment: Example Claude Code / MCP client configuration for the CHAOS Interaction MCP server.
This is an EXAMPLE ONLY. Iteration 2 deliberately does not ship an active repo-root .mcp.json,
so the server is not auto-wired while the Decision Center (Iteration 3) and resume flow
(Iteration 4) are not yet usable. To dogfood locally, copy this file to the repo root as
.mcp.json (or merge the mcpServers entry into your Claude settings), then reload the MCP client.
Paths are repo-root-relative placeholders; adjust if your client resolves from a different cwd.
Running the .ts source directly works on Node >= 22.6 (built-in TypeScript type-stripping).
After 'npm run build' you may instead point at the compiled entry:
